summary: The user sought assistance in updating their address with the US Postal Service (USPS) after changing their name. They had already updated their name with the Social Security Administration and received their new card on February 22nd, following court approval on January 15th. The user decided to upload their court approval letter as an additional document to ensure a smooth application process.
facts: The user updated their name with the Social Security Administration and received their new card on February 22nd. The user received a letter from the court stating that their name change application had been approved on January 15th, pending a hearing on January 25th. The user plans to upload their court approval letter as an additional document for their USPS change of address application. The user is compressing their files to reduce their size for uploading. The user is currently focused on updating their address with the USPS. The user is using the USPS website to submit Form PS 3575 for their address change. The user is providing proof of identity and residency to the USPS for their address change application. The user is advised to contact USPS customer service at 1-800-275-8777 for assistance if needed.
